svg.text: Managed File Transfer on Boomi (powered by Thru) — Solution Architecture (aligned to estate logical view)
EXTERNAL ESTATE — cross-government, digital & SaaS (native iPaaS)
iPaaS Platform · Boomi (control plane / external-facing runtime)
Managed landing zones (transient · encrypted at rest)
INTERNAL ESTATE — hosted · trusted zone · HA
(one process · reads a routing row → transfer
never a new build per interface)
Applied by config: PGP decrypt/encrypt (incl. ASCII-armor) · TAR (de)archive · validate · rename · route · post-action
e.g. CyberArk PAM / Azure Key Vault —
no native path to source MFT
